headlines.headline: Sources: Thunder's Shai Gilgeous-Alexander repeats as NBA MVP
headlines.description: Thunder star Shai Gilgeous-Alexander has won his second consecutive NBA Most Valuable Player award, becoming the 14th player in league history to win back-to-back MVPs, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.

headlines.headline: Shams: SGA to be named MVP for 2nd straight season
headlines.description: Shams Charania joins "SportsCenter" to break the news that Shai Gilgeous-Alexander has won his second consecutive MVP award.

headlines.headline: Why the fallout from this Cavs-Pistons Game 7 could be massive
headlines.description: A third straight second-round loss for the Cavaliers would invite enormous questions about their superstars -- and rival teams are watching.

headlines.headline: Wembanyama and the Spurs visit Oklahoma City to start Western Conference finals
headlines.description: San Antonio Spurs (62-20, second in the Western Conference) vs. Oklahoma City Thunder (64-18, first in the Western Conference)

headlines.headline: Shaq roasts Chuck as he graduates with his Masters degree at LSU
headlines.description: Shaq gets a standing ovation as he walks the stage to collect his masters degree from LSU.

headlines.headline: Knicks' Anunoby practices again, says hamstring not as bad as '24
headlines.description: OG Anunoby practiced again Saturday with the Knicks, saying afterward that his right hamstring injury is not as bad as the one he suffered in the 2024 playoffs.

headlines.headline: Patriots' longest-tenured employee, Nancy Meier, to retire
headlines.description: More on "Miss Nancy's" retirement and nine other Patriots notes from this week.

headlines.headline: How Matt Stover discovered new Packers kicker Trey Smack
headlines.description: Smack, the only kicker drafted in 2026, left lacrosse behind after a single kick of a football.

headlines.headline: RB Breece Hall believes he, Jets can 'really flourish'
headlines.description: The New York running back said part of the reason he signed a new contract was because of their new additions.

headlines.headline: Aaron Rodgers re-signs: How he fits the Steelers' offense
headlines.description: Does Rodgers have anything left? Will the Steelers' offense look the same as it did in 2025? And can running it back actually work for Pittsburgh?

headlines.headline: Mike Garrett's 'I scored a touchdown' story: SB IV
headlines.description: This "I scored a touchdown" story is focused on Mike Garrett's touchdown for the Chiefs in Super Bowl IV.

headlines.headline: Schefter confirms Aaron Rodgers returning to Steelers on 1-year deal
headlines.description: Adam Schefter gives the details on Aaron Rodgers officially returning to Pittsburgh next season.

headlines.headline: Team USA rebounds from loss, beats Britain at ice hockey worlds
headlines.description: The defending champion United States men's hockey team bounced back from a loss to Switzerland with a 5-1 victory over tournament newcomer Britain at the world championships.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Previews, stats, schedule, bracket

headlines.headline: Goalie change, offensive outburst keep Buffalo Sabres alive
headlines.description: Ukko-Pekka Luukkonen made 18 saves after starter Alex Lyon stopped only one of the four shots he faced, and the Sabres roared back to defeat the Canadiens 8-3 to force a Game 7 in this Eastern Conference semifinal series.

headlines.headline: Sabres rally to beat the Canadiens 8-3 to force Game 7
headlines.description: — Ukko-Pekka Luukkonen made 18 saves after starter Alex Lyon stopped only one of the four shots he faced, and the Buffalo Sabres roared back to beat the Montreal Canadiens 8-3 on Saturday night and force a Game 7 in the Eastern Conference semifinal...
